package.name: agv_mode_arbiter
package.description: Owns /agv/cmd_vel publication in the 3-mode navigation architecture. Relays exactly one of {cmd_vel_nav, cmd_vel_approach, cmd_vel_rail} based on zone + operator mode + rail_approach/rail_driver state. Eliminates the cmd_vel authorship race documented in agv_rail_approach/CLAUDE.md.
